questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match new vocabulary before the story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 old man = 老人
🔑 river = 河
🔑 mountain = 山
🔑 clothes = 衣服
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago, an old man and woman lived in a village.
questions.explanationZh: 很久以前,一對老夫婦住在一個小村莊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They were kind, but they had no children.
questions.explanationZh: 他們很善良,但是沒有孩子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old couple had no children.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 No — 故事說他們沒有孩子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every day, the old man went to the mountain.
questions.question: Where did the old man go each day?
questions.explanationZh: 老公公每天去山上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He cut wood in the mountain and brought it home.
questions.question: What did the old man bring home?
questions.explanationZh: 老公公帶木柴回家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the old couple want most?
questions.question: What did they want most?
questions.explanationZh: 他們最想要的是一個小孩。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old woman washed clothes at the river.
questions.questionEn: Did she wash clothes at the river?
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 她在河邊洗衣服。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every day, the old woman went to the river.
questions.question: Where did the old woman go each day?
questions.explanationZh: 老婆婆每天去河邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The couple lived a quiet life with no children.
questions.question: How was their daily life?
questions.explanationZh: 他們的生活安靜但孤單。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The small village was far from any big town.
questions.question: How was the village?
questions.explanationZh: 村莊小,又離大鎮很遠。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: An old man and woman lived in a village.
questions.explanationZh: 排出句子:很久以前,老夫婦住在一個村莊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match new vocabulary before the story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 big = 大
🔑 peach = 桃子
🔑 float = 漂
🔑 carry = 抱
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One spring day, the old woman went to the river.
questions.explanationZh: 一個春天,老婆婆去了河邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She saw something pink and big floating on the water.
questions.explanationZh: 她看見一個粉紅又大的東西漂在水上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A pink, round fruit floats toward her.
questions.question: What did she see in the river?
questions.explanationZh: 她看到的是一顆巨大的桃子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The peach was very small.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 No — 桃子很大,像她的頭一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The peach was as big as her head.
questions.question: How big was the peach?
questions.explanationZh: 桃子像她的頭那麼大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The peach was pink and round.
questions.question: What color was the peach?
questions.explanationZh: 桃子是粉紅色的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The peach floated on the water.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 桃子漂在水上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She lifted the heavy peach and walked home.
questions.question: What did she do with the peach?
questions.explanationZh: 她把桃子抱回家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The peach was heavy but the old woman carried it carefully.
questions.question: How did she carry the peach?
questions.explanationZh: 她小心抱著桃子,因為很重。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She wanted to show the peach to the old man.
questions.question: Who did she want to show the peach to?
questions.explanationZh: 她想拿給老公公看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old woman carried the peach home.
questions.explanationZh: 排出句子:老婆婆把桃子抱回家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match new vocabulary before the story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 baby boy = 男嬰
🔑 happy = 開心
🔑 open = 打開
🔑 name = 名字
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old couple put the peach on the table.
questions.explanationZh: 老夫婦把桃子放在桌上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The peach opened by itself. Inside was a baby boy.
questions.explanationZh: 桃子自己打開了。裡面有一個男嬰。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Inside the peach was a baby boy.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 桃子裡有個男嬰。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The peach split open by itself.
questions.question: How did the peach open?
questions.explanationZh: 桃子自己裂開。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the old couple feel?
questions.question: How did they feel?
questions.explanationZh: 他們非常開心。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old couple were happy to see the baby.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 他們很開心。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They named the baby Momotaro.
questions.question: What did they name the baby?
questions.explanationZh: 他們取名「桃太郎」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro means "peach boy" in Japanese.
questions.question: What does "Momotaro" mean?
questions.explanationZh: Momotaro 在日文是「桃男孩」的意思。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The baby came from a peach, so they gave him a peach name.
questions.question: Why did they name him Momotaro?
questions.explanationZh: 因為他從桃子來,所以叫桃男孩。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old couple became parents at last.
questions.question: What did the couple become?
questions.explanationZh: 他們終於當爸媽了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They named the baby Momotaro.
questions.explanationZh: 排出句子:他們為男嬰取名桃太郎。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match new vocabulary before the story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 strong = 強壯
🔑 kind = 善良
🔑 fight = 打
🔑 demon = 妖怪
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro grew quickly. He was strong and kind.
questions.explanationZh: 桃太郎長得很快。他強壯也善良。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One day, news came about demons on a far island.
questions.explanationZh: 有一天,傳來遠方島上有妖怪的消息。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro was strong and kind.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 他強壯也善良。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro grew quickly into a strong young man.
questions.question: How did Momotaro grow?
questions.explanationZh: 他長得快又強壯。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demons lived on Demon Island and hurt people.
questions.question: What did the demons do?
questions.explanationZh: 妖怪傷害人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did people feel about the demons?
questions.question: How did people feel?
questions.explanationZh: 大家很害怕妖怪。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demons came from Demon Island.
questions.questionEn: Did the demons come from Demon Island?
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 他們來自鬼島。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro told his parents he would fight the demons.
questions.question: What did Momotaro decide to do?
questions.explanationZh: 他決定去打妖怪。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro chose to leave home to keep his village safe.
questions.question: Why did he leave home?
questions.explanationZh: 他想保護村莊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His parents agreed and got ready for the journey.
questions.question: How did his parents respond?
questions.explanationZh: 父母答應他出發。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro will fight the demons.
questions.explanationZh: 排出句子:桃太郎要去打妖怪。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match new vocabulary before the story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 dog = 狗
🔑 monkey = 猴子
🔑 dumpling = 糰子
🔑 pheasant = 雉雞
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old woman made special millet dumplings for Momotaro.
questions.explanationZh: 老婆婆為桃太郎做了特別的黍米糰子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: On the road, he met a dog, a monkey, and a pheasant.
questions.explanationZh: 路上,他遇到一隻狗、一隻猴子、一隻雉雞。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Three animal friends joined Momotaro.
questions.question: Which three animals joined him?
questions.explanationZh: 狗、猴子、雉雞加入桃太郎。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old woman made millet dumplings for the trip.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 她做了糰子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The dog asked for a dumpling and joined Momotaro.
questions.question: What did the dog ask for?
questions.explanationZh: 狗想要一個糰子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After the dog, a monkey came down and asked for a dumpling.
questions.question: Who came after the dog?
questions.explanationZh: 狗之後是猴子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each animal joined Momotaro after he shared a dumpling.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 他分糰子給每隻動物。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A pheasant flew down and asked to join the team.
questions.question: What kind of animal is a pheasant?
questions.explanationZh: 雉雞是一種鳥。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each animal said it would fight by Momotaro's side.
questions.question: Why did the animals join him?
questions.explanationZh: 動物們想跟他一起打妖怪。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro now had three brave friends with him.
questions.question: How many friends did Momotaro have?
questions.explanationZh: 桃太郎現在有三個朋友。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A dog and a monkey joined him.
questions.explanationZh: 排出句子:狗跟猴子加入他。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match new vocabulary before the story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 boat = 船
🔑 fly = 飛
🔑 bite = 咬
🔑 sword = 劍
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They took a boat across the sea to Demon Island.
questions.explanationZh: 他們搭船渡海到鬼島。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The pheasant flew over the gate. The monkey climbed in.
questions.explanationZh: 雉雞飛過大門。猴子爬進去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They went to Demon Island by boat.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 他們搭船。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The pheasant flew over the gate first.
questions.question: Who flew over the gate?
questions.explanationZh: 雉雞飛過大門。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The monkey climbed over the wall and opened the gate.
questions.question: What did the monkey do?
questions.explanationZh: 猴子爬過去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Momotaro fight the demon king?
questions.question: What did Momotaro use?
questions.explanationZh: 桃太郎用劍打妖怪王。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The dog bit at the demons' legs.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 狗咬妖怪。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro fought the demon king with his sword.
questions.question: How did Momotaro fight?
questions.explanationZh: 桃太郎用劍打仗。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Together, the team beat the demons with brave hearts.
questions.question: How did they win?
questions.explanationZh: 靠團隊合作贏的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demons fell to their knees and begged.
questions.question: What did the demons do at the end?
questions.explanationZh: 妖怪跪下求饒。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The dog and monkey fought the demons.
questions.explanationZh: 排出句子:狗跟猴子打了妖怪。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match new vocabulary before the story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 gold = 金
🔑 silver = 銀
🔑 village = 村莊
🔑 welcome = 歡迎
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demons gave Momotaro gold, silver, and jewels.
questions.explanationZh: 妖怪把金、銀、珠寶都給桃太郎。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro and his friends sailed home with the treasures.
questions.explanationZh: 桃太郎和朋友們帶著寶物坐船回家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demons gave Momotaro treasures.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 妖怪給了寶物。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They sailed home with all the treasures.
questions.question: How did they go home?
questions.explanationZh: 他們坐船回家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What treasures did Momotaro bring back?
questions.question: What treasures did he bring?
questions.explanationZh: 他帶回金、銀、珠寶。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The whole village came out to welcome Momotaro.
questions.explanationZh: 答案 Yes — 整個村莊歡迎他。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The whole village came out to welcome them home.
questions.question: Who came out to welcome them?
questions.explanationZh: 整個村莊都出來歡迎。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old couple cried with joy when they saw him.
questions.question: How did the old couple feel?
questions.explanationZh: 他們開心地哭了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro shared the treasures with the whole village.
questions.question: What did Momotaro do with the treasures?
questions.explanationZh: 他把寶物分給村莊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Momotaro became a hero of the village.
questions.question: What did Momotaro become?
questions.explanationZh: 他成了村莊的英雄。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The village said welcome to Momotaro.
questions.explanationZh: 排出句子:村莊歡迎桃太郎。
